    Method
    Description
    Object
    IPersistenceProvider.create(MetaModel metaModel, Map values)
    Create a persistent object (saved in database) from the data passed in map format.

    Object
    TransientPersistenceProvider.create(MetaModel metaModel, Map values)
     
    Object
    IPersistenceProvider.createAggregate(MetaModel metaModel, Map values, MetaModel metaModelContainer, Object containerModel, int number)
    Create an aggregate (saving it in database) from the data passed in map format.
    Object

    Find a object from its key object.
    Object

  • Uses of MetaModel in org.openxava.web

    Methods in org.openxava.web with parameters of type MetaModel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    DescriptionsLists.fillReferenceValues(Map<String,Object> values, MetaModel metaModel, String value)
    Overload to fill a provided map with parsed key values using only MetaModel.
    static Map<String,Object>
    DescriptionsLists.parseKeyValues(MetaModel metaModel, String value)
    Convenience overload to parse composite key values without providing request/view.
    static Map<String,Object>
    DescriptionsLists.parseKeyValues(MetaModel metaModel, String value, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, Messages errors, String viewName, boolean emptyIfNotBracketed)
    Parses a key string using MetaModel key properties.
    static Map<String,Object>
    DescriptionsLists.parseKeyValues(MetaModel metaModel, Collection<String> keyPropertiesNames, String value)
    Convenience overload to parse using provided key property names without request/view.
    static Map<String,Object>
    DescriptionsLists.parseKeyValues(MetaModel metaModel, Collection<String> keyPropertiesNames, String value, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, Messages errors, String viewName, boolean emptyIfNotBracketed)
    Parses a key string using the given key property names instead of the MetaModel primary key.
    static String
    DescriptionsLists.toKeyString(MetaModel metaModel, Map<String,Object> keyValues)
    Formats key values into the standard key string representation.
